title: bobua stellaris
side_effects: Bobua stellaris can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, insomnia, and gastrointestinal issues. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory distress. Improper dosing or preparation of the plant can result in symptoms like nausea, dizziness, and tremors. In severe cases, misuse of bobua stellaris can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as hypertension or diabetes.
